item.title: Create Artifacts directly from Claude Tag!

item.title:
Just got back from Germany + Austrian Alps. Was an awesome 2 weeks and recharged and ready to share some awesome Claude Tag updates with y'all over next few weeks.
Jeder Tag ist ein Claude Tag https:
item.description:
Just got back from Germany + Austrian Alps. Was an awesome 2 weeks and recharged and ready to share some awesome Claude Tag updates with y'all over next few weeks.
Jeder Tag ist ein Claude Tag https://t.co/xnpHX0NyHe

item.title: Experience the future of working with AI. Our journey from Claude Code —> Claude Tag.
item.description: Experience the future of working with AI. Our journey from Claude Code —> Claude Tag.

item.title: The best way to experience Fable? Use it in Claude Tag -- incredible for driving a powerful AI teammate and Fable usage is covered by the $25,000 promo for Enterprise / $2,500 credit for Teams throug
item.description: The best way to experience Fable? Use it in Claude Tag -- incredible for driving a powerful AI teammate and Fable usage is covered by the $25,000 promo for Enterprise / $2,500 credit for Teams through September 1st

item.title: RT @claudeai: Fable 5 is back. https://t.co/9RTGUCcPHy
item.description: RT @claudeai: Fable 5 is back. https://t.co/9RTGUCcPHy

item.title: Thrilled you're enjoying it. You can change the model for any channel or workspace default under https://t.co/vGfZECfWAV > Select scope > Advanced
item.description: Thrilled you're enjoying it. You can change the model for any channel or workspace default under https://t.co/vGfZECfWAV > Select scope > Advanced

item.title:
With the launch of Claude Tag, we're sharing the future of work with the world. Working with agents means working in some new forward-looking ways. We're excited to share some best practices below
ht

With the launch of Claude Tag, we're sharing the future of work with the world. Working with agents means working in some new forward-looking ways. We're excited to share some best practices below

item.title:
🧵Claude Tag without the Tag (aka Ambient Claude)
One of my favorite ways to use Claude Tag is as an ambient partner -- one you don't need to explicitly tag.
How to get this set up?
item.description:
🧵Claude Tag without the Tag (aka Ambient Claude)
One of my favorite ways to use Claude Tag is as an ambient partner -- one you don't need to explicitly tag.
How to get this set up?

item.title:
"What can Claude Tag do in this channel?"
Follow the Configure link at the bottom of the thread to check out the available connections and channel prompting. Available repositories coming soon.
(adm
item.description:
"What can Claude Tag do in this channel?"
Follow the Configure link at the bottom of the thread to check out the available connections and channel prompting. Available repositories coming soon.
(admins can disable channel prompt edits if desired) https://t.co/vruCfPmGO6

item.title: I use these almost every day internally to share information with my team
item.description: I use these almost every day internally to share information with my team

item.title:
Fable has changed how I work as a PM. Previously I would help out around the edges of our products — copy changes, visual re-skins, prototypes...
Fable lets me contribute real significant features, t
item.description:
Fable has changed how I work as a PM. Previously I would help out around the edges of our products — copy changes, visual re-skins, prototypes...
Fable lets me contribute real significant features, that combined with Code Review, are able to quickly ship to production.
